emails.subject: Brazilian Regulations for Swaps & Prepays
emails.body: Help me understand HOW MANY Tozzini memoranda exist which address financial swaps and derivatives. I e-mailed Michael about this attachment and I think his response was that Antonio Felix ADDED comments to the attachment. I am not clear. I am aware of only TWO Tozzini memos dated 12/26/97 (physical trading of energy) and 2/20/98 (local derivatives market). Let's all start from the same point. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 08/24/99 11:06 AM Michael Guerriero@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 08/20/99 07:45 AM

emails.subject: Re: Brazilian Regulations for Swaps & Prepays
emails.body: Re: Brazilian Regulations for Swaps Prepays Sara: attached is the memo that I received from Tozzini Freire yesterday. As you will notice, the memo addresses Gustavo's questions and corrects certain assumptions made by him in his e-mail. Sara Shackleton@ECT 08/24/99 02:10 PM
